requiredCorrections.note: Increase contact information (phone/email) and ensure it stands out as a clear call-to-action. Consider a colored ribbon, enlarged text, or button treatment.
Integrate the QR code visually—avoid a hard-edged white box; blend it into the design with a soft panel, ribbon, or brand-colored scrim.
Increase spacing and separation between different information blocks, especially between benefits, interviews, and job details.
Make the candidate-facing hook (role/trade opportunity & destination) more visually dominant; currently 'Earning AED 2,200' overwhelms country/opportunity info.
